overall.description: First-person exploration of the Azkaban Dungeons from a video game, featuring gothic stone architecture, vaulted ceilings, and atmospheric fog. The player walks through curved corridors, pillared halls, and chambers with suits of armor, ending in a large circular room with ornate windows.

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a curved corridor filled with atmospheric fog, passing gothic archways. The lighting is dimmer here, with a hanging chandelier visible in the distance. The segment ends as the camera approaches a chamber containing a large decorative stone vase and another suit of armor.

segments.scene_description: The player opens the raven-emblazoned door to reveal a massive circular chamber with a domed ceiling. The room features a central raised dais with an ornate structure and large circular windows with star patterns, creating an impressive architectural finale to the dungeon exploration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic gothic corridor that expands into a series of grand, atmospheric chambers. It begins by moving steadily along a curved stone hallway past wall-mounted lanterns and arched alcoves toward a heavy wooden door. As the door opens, the space shifts into a larger vaulted chamber illuminated by a burning brazier and an eerie green magical glow, where suits of armor stand guard. The scene then opens further into a fog-filled circular hall featuring massive stone pillars and an ornate floor pattern under the warm light of a hanging chandelier. Finally, the camera glides through stone archways into connected halls, passing more armored figures stationed within the shadows of the alcoves.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through narrow, oppressive gothic corridors that gradually open into a massive, ornate circular chamber. It begins in a long stone corridor flanked by columns and wall sconces, ascending a staircase past a suit of armor standing in a niche. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a curved, fog-filled hallway of dim lighting and gothic archways, passing under a distant chandelier before entering a chamber containing a decorative stone vase. The scene then focuses on a large wooden door adorned with a carved raven emblem, which opens to reveal a sudden expansion of space. Finally, the camera enters a vast circular room with a domed ceiling, centering on a raised dais beneath large circular windows featuring intricate star patterns.
